$comment: M365 collector scope for the CheckID registry sync. The upstream CheckID registry serves multiple assessment scopes (M365, Windows endpoint via WIN-*, Azure subscription via AZ-*). M365-Assess ships only checks its collectors can emit: sync-checkid.yml filters registry.json to the collectors listed here, and Import-ControlRegistry excludes anything outside this list as a runtime guard. When CheckID upstream introduces a new M365 collector family that this module implements, add it here. 'Backup' is a known-but-unimplemented collector (BACKUP-ENABLED-001, Microsoft 365 Backup) kept in scope pending a src/M365-Assess/Backup/ collector.
